transcript.text: This meeting is being recorded.
Hello.
Hey, Fernando.
Hi, Will.
How are you?
doing, my friend?
Doing good.
How are you?
Doing good.
Thanks.
It's nice to meet you sort of face-to-face.
As close as we can get.
Where are you from?
I'm from Venezuela, based in Argentina.
I'm from the same town as Jesus Yepez, Jesus.
Got it, got it, got it.
Very cool.
Very, very cool.
Okay.
Well, I have to tell you, I was really impressed by your reel, both your short form and obviously, like, you've got a very good eye for those cold open, those hook opens.
Yeah, from what I could tell.
Yeah, no, it was, well done.
Um, we're right now kind of like trying a few different experiments, but I could see the possibility of us, of us being a good fit.

I think I just want to kind of like tell you a little bit about what we're doing, um, and what we're looking for and also kind of where we're at right now with, uh, with a few other, you know, experiments, I guess you might say, um, for a little while.
So, so I'm like, I'm the head video producer for, for growth X and for AI like growth.
Um, I'm also, I'm not like a traditional producer in the sense that like, uh, I'm just, you know, hiring contractors.
I'm also, uh, you know, a director, uh, a DP, an editor, you know, I can, I can kind of do it all.
Um, and so for a while we've been trying to establish a good kind of consistent brand, consistent style.
With some of the content and then, um.
You know, try to streamline some different pipelines for producing it quickly.
As of right now, we're kind of in a reboot phase.
We had another editor that we were using.
He was from the Bay Area, but he's an older guy.
He's, like, in his 50s, and so his style was just a little older, if you know what I mean.
What's up, Jesus?
A little crispy, I'd say.
Crispy, now I know.
You guys were already here.
So anyway, so we're trying to go in a different direction.
We're trying to, you know, play into, you know, really what the algorithm on YouTube is looking for, which is that first 30 seconds, it's got a hook.
Obviously, like, good packaging with a title and thumbnail.
But I guess my questions for you is, if you don't mind, mean, what...
you we have...
What tools are you using?
What's kind of in your tool bag as far as video goes these days?
I know things change a lot, so I'm sure it's different now than it was in the past.
Right now at my studio, me use Premiere Pro and After Effects.
After of Premiere Pro for the montage, for the captions, and the After Effects is where the magic goes.
You go with the zoom-ins, with some text, you know.
But right now we started using the AI tools to start to...
To improve our workflow and started to with some prompts to we download the transcript and use a prompt to chat GBT, make the time codes for the intro or for the shorts.
And that's pretty, I use right now.
That's great.
That gives me all the clarity I need and well done.
I mean, that's anybody working in this industry with editing that's not doing that is wasting a lot of time.

You know, it's so much faster to arrive at a good cold open, a good, you know, quick cutting edit when you can just say like, hey, give me the best, the best lines that are going to hook the audience and deliver value early up.
So, amazing.
After Effects is beautiful.

I think, you know, like my own, just a personal aside, I think that there will be AI motion graphic tools that will, you know, make what would otherwise have taken, you know, in After Effects, even like a half an hour done in an instant.
But we're not quite there.
We're almost there, but not quite there.
So I appreciate your expertise in After Effects.
That is the industry standard.
I guess my question to you now would be, well, first of all, do you have any other questions for me as far as like what you would expect delivery wise or anything like that?
Any questions that come to your mind?
No, right now the question is pretty much what are you, sorry, right here.
The question is why are you?
Where are you looking with my edit?
I don't know if you want one video a week, two videos a week, and I don't know, five chores a week.
That's pretty much the big question.
Okay.
So for right now, we are so early that you would probably want to test.
And, you know, I would say maybe the ask would be one video, five to seven minutes, but with a retention edit.
So a cold open, and then, you know, the magic, as you say, to keep viewers engaged with on-screen text.
After the call, if it's okay, I'd like to send you a few samples of kind of what we're working on right now.
And I'll let you look at it and tell me kind of, they say, know, okay, I see what they're looking for.
see what they're trying to do.
And so you don't have to answer right now, but then basically give us a bid.
What would you want to charge us for one of a video like the one I'm going to send you?
And then after that, depending on how it goes, again, I'm very confident in your quality.
I just, I just hope it's the right fit, you know, that, and I think it's reasonable to just test and see how.
No, it's okay.
It's how it works in every.
Yes.
Okay.
So I will send you some samples.
You can send me a bid for what it would take to make an equivalent type video.
And probably even to be perfectly honest, probably better than what I'm going to send you.
I'm confident that you could do better.
Not putting pressure.
You're normal, right?
You're normal.
You're
But give us a quote, and then I'll run it past my boss, our VP of growth, and I know that we're trying right now again to experiment.
We're trying to test.
We're trying to see, like, you know, let's try this, let's try that.
Which is working better?
How can we tell?
And this is just one of those channels that we're trying to test.
So what would be the best way for me to contact you directly?
Are you on Slack?
Can we get you in Slack?
Or is email better?
What's the best way?
I don't know.
I use Slack in my studio.
You can add me in one Slack.
I don't have a problem.
If you want, I can take charge of that and add you to our Slack and connect you both through Slack.
That would be great.
Yeah, perfect.
And then that way we have a central hub.
If you don't mind adding Jason to, hey.
Jesus, to that Slack, just so he can see what's going on, and then we'll, again, like, I'll show you a couple of samples, and then you can just let me know.

I've already talked to Jason about this meeting, so it's, you know, we know we're engaging with you, but I, as far as, like, shorts and other asks in the future, I think there's a lot of opportunity for that.
But I just, as of right now, I think let's just try to start with one video, get a bid, see if we can get that approved, and then see what happens from there, if that's okay.
Okay, the video example is a short form, or is, like, long form, like seven minutes?
Yeah, seven minutes.
It wouldn't be a short.
Now, I don't know if that, does that, I mean, I'll send you an example of the exact kind of video we would look at.
So you'll be able to see the level of motion graphics, the level of, you know, that being said, I'm not going to say.
If you like log footage or like, you know, raw uncut footage, would send you a talking head that had been edited to the, you know, the story that we're trying to convey.
And then we would simply ask that you would breathe life into it.
You know, that would be the ask.
Yeah, yeah.
It's okay.
All right, Fernando.
Well, listen, I appreciate you taking the time.
Hey, how long have you guys known each other?
I'm curious.
How old were you when you met?
Like six, seven years old, maybe.
Oh, my goodness.
My mother teach Jesus in kindergarten.
Oh, yeah.
She was my one of my first professors, I remember.
So now we know who to blame for the great intellect that is Jesus.
Oh, my God.
That's where it all started.
That's where it all started.
Well, that's awesome.
I love to keep it in the family, keep it with friends.
But I.
Yeah.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Intro call to vet Fernando Diaz for a video editing role.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GrowthX is rebooting its video strategy** to boost YouTube retention with modern, algorithm-friendly edits, replacing a previous editor whose style was deemed "crispy."](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Fernando Diaz's reel impressed Will Proctor** with its strong hooks and modern style; his workflow uses Premiere Pro, After Effects, and AI (ChatGPT) for efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**A 1-video test project is planned** to assess fit. Fernando will bid on a 5–7 min "retention edit" after reviewing sample videos from Will.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Jesus Yepez will create a shared Slack channel** to centralize communication and connect Will, Fernando, and Jason (VP of Growth).](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Video Strategy Reboot

  - [GrowthX is overhauling its video strategy to increase YouTube retention.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**Goal:** Modernize style and streamline production pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Problem:** The previous editor's style was "crispy" (outdated), necessitating a change.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**New Focus:**](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Strong hooks in the first 30 seconds.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Polished packaging (titles, thumbnails).](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [Retention edits (on-screen text, zooms) to maintain engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Fernando Diaz's Workflow & Capabilities

  - [Fernando's reel demonstrated a modern style with effective cold opens.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [**Tool Stack:**](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
      - [**Premiere Pro:** Montage and captions.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [**After Effects:** Motion graphics (zooms, text).](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [**AI Integration:** Uses ChatGPT with transcripts to generate timecodes for hooks and shorts, significantly speeding up the editing process.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Proposed Test Project

  - [A 1-video test project will assess fit before any larger commitment.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Scope:** One 5–7 minute video requiring a full "retention edit."](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
    1.  [Will sends sample videos to define the required style.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
    2.  [Fernando submits a bid for an equivalent video.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
    3.  [Will presents the bid to Jason (VP of Growth) for approval.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [**Future Potential:** If successful, the partnership could expand to include shorts and a higher volume of videos.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Will Proctor:** Send sample videos to Fernando Diaz.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Fernando Diaz:** Review samples and submit a bid for the test video.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [**Jesus Yepez:** Create a shared Slack channel for Will, Fernando, and Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/BkdQREtbRSYfgUoYhyrK82V6itgAVBkw?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

action_items.description: Send Fernando sample 5-7 min retention-edit video; request bid; route to VP for approval
Add Fernando Diaz and Jason to GrowthX Slack; intro Fernando↔Will
